requirement_topic.en: GRENLEC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, PURC Regulatory Framework, and Hurricane-Resilience Design Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: GRENLEC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933、PURC监管框架及飓风韧性设计要求
requirement_topic.zht: GRENLEC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933、PURC監管框架及颶風韌性設計要求

summary.en: Grenada Electricity Services Ltd (GRENLEC) is the sole licensed electricity generation, transmission, and distribution utility in Grenada, operating under a licence granted by the Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC). PURC is the statutory energy regulator established under the Public Utilities Regulatory Commission Act (No. 26 of 2016). All grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale, C&I, or behind-the-meter — require GRENLEC technical review and grid-connection approval, and operate within the PURC regulatory framework. Grenada's grid operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V), consistent with IEC/UK-legacy standards adopted across the OECS (Organisation of Eastern Caribbean States). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Grenada's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards, including IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2, are the internationally expected technical references for BESS grid-connection specifications in IEC-framework jurisdictions. A publicly accessible GRENLEC technical interconnection specification specifically for BESS had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; direct engagement with GRENLEC and PURC is essential to obtain current project requirements. Grenada's post-Hurricane Ivan (2004) reconstruction context means grid resilience and hardened installation design are practical project expectations even where not formalised in published technical standards.
summary.zh: 格林纳达电力服务有限公司（GRENLEC）是格林纳达唯一持牌的电力发电、输电和配电公用事业公司，依据公用事业监管委员会（PURC）颁发的许可证运营。PURC是依据《公用事业监管委员会法》（2016年第26号法）设立的法定能源监管机构。所有并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模、工商业还是表后项目——均须取得GRENLEC技术审查和并网批准，并在PURC监管框架内运营。格林纳达电网运行参数为230/400 V、50 Hz（单相230 V、三相400 V），符合OECS（东加勒比国家组织）各国采用的IEC/英国传统标准。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对格林纳达230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2，是IEC框架司法管辖区内BESS并网规格的国际预期技术参考。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认GRENLEC公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格；直接与GRENLEC和PURC接触以获取当前项目要求至关重要。2004年伊万飓风后的格林纳达重建背景意味着，即使未在公开技术标准中正式规定，电网韧性和加固安装设计也是项目的实际预期。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達電力服務有限公司（GRENLEC）是格瑞那達唯一持牌的電力發電、輸電和配電公用事業公司，依據公用事業監管委員會（PURC）頒發的許可證運營。PURC是依據《公用事業監管委員會法》（2016年第26號法）設立的法定能源監管機構。所有併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模、工商業還是表後項目——均須取得GRENLEC技術審查和併網批准，並在PURC監管框架內運營。格瑞那達電網運行參數為230/400 V、50 Hz（單相230 V、三相400 V），符合OECS（東加勒比國家組織）各國採用的IEC/英國傳統標準。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對格瑞那達230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2，是IEC框架司法管轄區內BESS併網規格的國際預期技術參考。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認GRENLEC公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格；直接與GRENLEC和PURC接觸以獲取當前項目要求至關重要。2004年伊萬颶風後的格瑞那達重建背景意味著，即使未在公開技術標準中正式規定，電網韌性和加固安裝設計也是項目的實際預期。

standards_or_laws: Public Utilities Regulatory Commission Act, No. 26 of 2016 (Grenada) — statutory basis for PURC energy regulation and GRENLEC licence framework
GRENLEC Grid-Connection Technical Requirements — direct engagement required; no confirmed publicly accessible BESS-specific interconnection standard as of dataset date

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference in IEC-framework jurisdictions)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Grenada grid parameters: 230/400 V, 50 Hz (IEC/UK legacy, consistent with OECS regional grid standard)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Grenada's 230/400 V. Although both grids share 50 Hz frequency, the voltage levels differ: PCS firmware, protection thresholds, and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V must be re-parameterised and retested for Grenada's 230/400 V grid conditions. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable to Grenada.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与格林纳达230/400 V不同。尽管两国电网共用50 Hz频率，电压等级有别：针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件、保护阈值和穿越参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对格林纳达230/400 V电网条件进行参数配置和重新测试。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于格林纳达。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與格瑞那達230/400 V不同。儘管兩國電網共用50 Hz頻率，電壓等級有別：針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、保護閾值和穿越參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對格瑞那達230/400 V電網條件進行參數配置和重新測試。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於格瑞那達。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy GRENLEC's grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences and project considerations requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Grenada is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; both are 50 Hz but voltage is different — PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for 230/400 V; (b) GRENLEC project-specific connection requirements — engage GRENLEC and PURC at the earliest project stage to obtain technical interconnection requirements before equipment design is finalised; no confirmed publicly accessible BESS-specific GRENLEC technical specification as of dataset date; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications reference IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) PURC regulatory approval pathway — confirm with PURC whether a specific approval process applies to grid-connected BESS energy storage projects beyond GRENLEC interconnection; (e) hurricane-resilience design — wind-load ratings meeting Caribbean building codes (Category 4–5 hurricane exposure post-Ivan 2004) and salt-mist corrosion resistance (IEC 60068-2-52) should be documented and confirmed with GRENLEC and the project owner.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足GRENLEC并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异和项目考量：（a）电网电压——格林纳达为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两者均为50 Hz，但电压不同——须针对230/400 V重新配置并重新测试PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数；（b）GRENLEC项目专属并网要求——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与GRENLEC和PURC接触以获取并网技术要求；截至本数据集日期，尚未确认GRENLEC公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）PURC监管审批路径——向PURC确认GRENLEC并网协议之外是否有专门的并网BESS储能项目审批程序；（e）飓风韧性设计——风荷载等级须满足加勒比海建筑规范（2004年伊万飓风后的四至五级飓风暴露标准）及IEC 60068-2-52盐雾腐蚀要求，须向GRENLEC和项目业主确认文件证明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足GRENLEC併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異和項目考量：（a）電網電壓——格瑞那達為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者均為50 Hz，但電壓不同——須針對230/400 V重新配置並重新測試PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數；（b）GRENLEC項目專屬併網要求——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與GRENLEC和PURC接觸以獲取併網技術要求；截至本數據集日期，尚未確認GRENLEC公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）PURC監管審批路徑——向PURC確認GRENLEC併網協議之外是否有專門的併網BESS儲能項目審批程序；（e）颶風韌性設計——風荷載等級須滿足加勒比海建築規範（2004年伊萬颶風後的四至五級颶風暴露標準）及IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧腐蝕要求，須向GRENLEC和項目業主確認文件證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GRENLEC grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Grenada under the PURC regulatory framework; BESS-specific published technical interconnection requirements have not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — direct engagement with GRENLEC and PURC is essential
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Grenada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy GRENLEC's Grenada grid-connection requirements. Although both China and Grenada operate at 50 Hz, voltages differ (China 220/380 V vs Grenada 230/400 V) — BESS PCS must be re-parameterised and retested for 230/400 V. Engage GRENLEC and PURC at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and any PURC approval pathway for BESS storage projects. No publicly accessible GRENLEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised. Additionally confirm hurricane wind-load and salt-mist corrosion design requirements for Caribbean deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足GRENLEC格林纳达并网要求。尽管中国和格林纳达均采用50 Hz，但电压不同（中国220/380 V，格林纳达230/400 V）——BESS储能变流器须针对230/400 V重新配置参数并重新测试。应在项目最早阶段与GRENLEC和PURC接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及任何PURC针对BESS储能项目的审批路径。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认GRENLEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。此外，还需确认加勒比海部署的飓风风荷载和盐雾腐蚀设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足GRENLEC格瑞那達併網要求。儘管中國和格瑞那達均採用50 Hz，但電壓不同（中國220/380 V，格瑞那達230/400 V）——BESS儲能變流器須針對230/400 V重新配置參數並重新測試。應在項目最早階段與GRENLEC和PURC接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及任何PURC針對BESS儲能項目的審批路徑。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認GRENLEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。此外，還需確認加勒比海部署的颶風風荷載和鹽霧腐蝕設計要求。
